failed in chained workflow but standalone stage passed

The rerun reached stage_11 (cockroachdb/expose-ingress) but never reached solver launch. The additive crdb_ingress_infra precondition installed the upstream ingress-nginx manifest, whose controller pod requires nodes labeled ingress-ready=true. On the remote cluster no nodes matched that selector, so the controller pod stayed Pending and the stage setup could not complete.

Stage 01 never reached solver execution. The current precondition path patches the StatefulSet template label to monitoring=disabled and restarts pods, but the pod-guard init container hard-fails unless monitoring=enabled, so all mongodb-replica pods stay in Init:CrashLoopBackOff and admin_user_fixture verification loops forever.
